provenance.source: high-confidence review threads, applied before merge

findings.description: Navigation-provided filters must use the same validation path as normal filters; otherwise invalid ranges can be serialized and sent to the backend.
Navigation filter state must preserve duplicate numeric bounds for the same field instead of overwriting one bound by filterKey.
Range input popovers must reset from the current chip value when reopened, not retain stale draft strings from a previous failed submit.
A single numeric gte or lte bound is a complete filter and must not be treated as incomplete.
Adding numeric filters from the dropdown must store state under normalized condition-specific keys so hydration and persistence agree.
Filter state updates should not call other setState functions or fire side effects from inside a setDraftFilters updater.
Changing a numeric filter condition must not silently reject the update with no user feedback when both range bounds exist.
